codeReview.summary: The handoff commit correctly adds the missing exact-name facade regression for the combined STT/TTS check, but the underlying voice pipeline still has a blocking parity gap: disabling output streaming only filters emitted audio events after synthesis instead of skipping TTS generation entirely.

issues.description: Transcript-only runs still call `tts_model.synthesize()` even when `VoicePipelineConfig.stream_audio` is `false`. Audio suppression happens later in `VoiceStreamRecorder::push_events()` (`crates/agents-voice/src/result.rs:177`), so a disabled-audio pipeline still depends on TTS succeeding and still pays synthesis work. That violates the feature contract to suppress audio when output streaming is disabled; a transcript-only run can currently fail because of TTS even though no audio should be produced.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, commit `74521f3`, transcript skeleton, skill file, and current voice pipeline/tests. The new regression test is good, but the feature should not be considered complete because `stream_audio = false` does not actually disable TTS execution.
